x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist applies a dedicated Major Incident summarization template when major_incident_state is set. Low population means most P1/P2 incidents get generic AI summaries instead of richer executive-ready format.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure the Major Incident State field is set on all P1 incidents and on P2 incidents that are formally declared as major incidents. Configure automation or a mandatory UI policy on P1 closure to enforce this. Now Assist applies a dedicated MI summarization template only when major_incident_state is populated.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_baf8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851ca2
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist applies a dedicated Major Incident summarization template when major_incident_state is set. Low population means most P1/P2 incidents get generic AI summaries instead of richer executive-ready format.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Major Incident Process Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    function getMIRate(priority) {
        var totalGr = new GlideAggregate('incident');
        totalGr.addQuery('priority', priority);
        totalGr.addQuery('state', '!=', -5);
        totalGr.addAggregate('COUNT');
        totalGr.query();
        var total = totalGr.next() ? parseInt(totalGr.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;
        if (total === 0) return { total: 0, populated: 0, pct: 0 };

        var popGr = new GlideAggregate('incident');
        popGr.addQuery('priority', priority);
        popGr.addQuery('state', '!=', -5);
        popGr.addQuery('major_incident_state', '!=', '');
        popGr.addAggregate('COUNT');
        popGr.query();
        var populated = popGr.next() ? parseInt(popGr.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

        return { total: total, populated: populated, pct: Math.round((populated / total) * 100) };
    }

    var p1 = getMIRate(1);
    var p2 = getMIRate(2);

    var actualValue = 'P1: ' + p1.populated + '/' + p1.total + ' (' + p1.pct + '%) | P2: ' + p2.populated + '/' + p2.total + ' (' + p2.pct + '%)';

    var p1Status = p1.total === 0 ? 'not_applicable' : p1.pct >= 80 ? 'ready' : p1.pct >= 50 ? 'needs_attention' : 'not_ready';
    var p2Status = p2.total === 0 ? 'not_applicable' : p2.pct >= 30 ? 'ready' : p2.pct >= 10 ? 'needs_attention' : 'not_ready';

    var statusRank = { 'not_ready': 0, 'needs_attention': 1, 'ready': 2, 'not_applicable': 3 };
    var overallStatus = statusRank[p1Status] <= statusRank[p2Status] ? p1Status : p2Status;

    return {
        status: overallStatus,
        actualValue: actualValue,
        finding: 'P1 Major Incident State: ' + p1.pct + '% populated (' + p1.populated + ' of ' + p1.total + '). P2: ' + p2.pct + '% (' + p2.populated + ' of ' + p2.total + '). Now Assist uses major_incident_state to apply MI-specific summarization templates.'
    };
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITSM</module><number>CHK0000348</number><order>340</order><remediation_guidance>Ensure the Major Incident State field is set on all P1 incidents and on P2 incidents that are formally declared as major incidents. Configure automation or a mandatory UI policy on P1 closure to enforce this. Now Assist applies a dedicated MI summarization template only when major_incident_state is populated.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>baf8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851ca2</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Major Incident Process Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_baf8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851ca2</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
